title: PliXaZ Nature
description: A mod pack that improves the Minecraft experience without destroying it with the heaviest mods, makes it enjoyable to play and decorate your house as well as go on adventures by exploring and fighting through dungeons
body:
A mod pack that improves the Minecraft experience without destroying it with the heaviest mods, makes it enjoyable to play and decorate your house as well as go on adventures by exploring and fighting through dungeons

**This ModPack includes:**
- More Biomes and New Structures for the overworld, nether and the end (Better Archeology, Dungeons and Taverns, Explorify, The YUNG's Library, Biomes o' Plenty, ...)
- Some new Mobs (Enderman Overhaul, Friends&Foes, ...)
- Improved hud and first/third person (Dynamic Crosshair, Boat Item View, CameraOverhaul, ...)
- Additional Furniture to decorate your buildings (Beautify: Refabricated, Handcrafted, Cooking for Blockheads, ...)
- Ambient sounds for the better gaming experience (AmbientSounds, Eclectic Sounds, ImmersiveThunder, ...)
- Optimizations mods, unnecessary GPU and CPU load like mods (Sodium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, ...)
- shaders to choose (BSL Shaders, Complementary Shaders, ...)
- vanilla like resource packs to choose (Vanilla Evolved, VanillaXBR, Faithful 64x, ...)
- overhaul mods and QoL addons (InvMove, Inventory Profiles Next, Bridging Mod, ...)
- etc.


It can be played alone or with Friends

It's recommended to play with a 16GB+ System

_Minecraft Version 1.20.4_
